title: [MTR4] StarTrain A575
description: Adds the StarTrain A575 to Minecraft.
body:
The StarTrain A575 is a metro train and a high-floor LRV train. The front cars and back cars have a pantograph. It's a fictional train built by StarTrain in 2009 and entered service into San Marvin (an upcoming MTR4 city) in 2011.

REQUIRES: MTR version 4.0.4 or higher

FUN FACT: This is one of the many trains that I originally made for MTR3 but I never released it for a very long time, along with my Kinki Sharyo P3010 pack.
